dialogos.texto_en: Itsuki, I found you!\nI was looking for you.
Yotsuba?\n...Are you alone?
Yeah.\nI wanted to talk with you, Itsuki.
Huh? What is it?
Why did you suddenly suggest\nwe play the quintuplets game?
Well... As a test for Uesugi-kun...
Is that really it?
I'm just guessing, but could it \nhave something to do with me?\n...About what happened in Kyoto?
Yes.\nIt's just as you guessed.
I knew it.
But also, testing Uesugi-kun was my true intention.\nI thought it was necessary\nto correct his indecisiveness.
However, if we do it in this way...\nIt might also make it easier\nfor you to talk about the past...
Yotsuba.\nFor your sake, too%p-2;――
I want Uesugi-kun to know\nthat the child he met in Kyoto six years ago\nwas you.
Thank you.\nYou were really thinking about me that much, huh?
But, that's okay now.\nI've decided not to rely on past memories anymore.
But!\nIs it really okay to leave it like that?\nThis might be the last chance you have, you know?!
Itsuki...
...With this game, all of us are equal.
Nino, Miku, and Ichika too.\nIf everyone else is looking for an answer\nfrom Uesugi-kun%p-2;――
You deserve the same opportunity.
Even though you say\nyou don't rely on memories of the past,\nyou still think about him...
I'm sorry.\nI always make you play the difficult roles, Itsuki.
It's all because I got you involved in my past.
Don't mind me!\nRight now, it's about you%p-2;――
However, you might be misunderstanding things a bit.
...What do you mean?
Right now, I like Uesugi-san,\nregardless of the past or anything else.
That's why I won't rely on the past anymore.\nI want you to understand that too, Itsuki.
That's...
You don't have to worry about me anymore.
A lot happened at the school festival, didn't it?\nThat was when I took a step forward too.
What's important is now, not the past.
I moved forward, forever not relying on my memories\nof the past, to find my own value in the present.
What's important, is now...
Yeah. Since then,\nI've been interacting with Uesugi-san as who I am now.
So, I thought about it.
I realized,\nI really do like him...
I know it's probably impossible,\nbut if Uesugi-san were to choose me...
Yotsuba, you...
Yeah.
(For Yotsuba,\n the past is no longer something to cling to.\n And yet, why am I the only one, who...)
Hey, Itsuki. I want you to think carefully\nabout your own feelings too.
Huh...
You said it yourself, didn't you?\nIn this quintuplets game, everyone is equal.
If Uesugi-san chose you, Itsuki,\nhow would you respond?
W-well...
Right? You've gotta think about that.
(That's something I was forced to think about\n during the school festival.)
(But in the end, Uesugi-kun didn't choose anyone,\n and disregarded my...or rather, our resolve.)
(We naturally felt indignant at that answer.\n We felt indignant, but...\n somewhere deep in my heart, I...)
(...So, that's how I truly felt.)
(I was scared. I, who couldn't even muster\n the same resolve as everyone else,\n if by some chance I were chosen...)
(For me to be chosen, means that none of the others\n will be chosen.)
(I probably wanted to run away from there...\n using the peace of my sisters and Yotsuba\n as an excuse...)
(While demanding resolve from him,\n I refused to have any resolve of my own...\n and even vented my frustration onto him.)
(Those words at that time\n were words meant for myself...)
Itsuki? Are you alright?
...I also need to make up my mind.
Yeah, that's right. For everyone's sake.
Making up one's mind is such a frightening thing...
Yeah, it takes a lot of courage, doesn't it?
I was so awful to Uesugi-kun.\nI need to apologize to him...
...It's strange, isn't it?\nWhen you fall in love,\neven your own feelings become uncontrollable.
W-well, it's not exactly love...\nI haven't even sorted out my own feelings yet...
Let's think it through.\nWe still have a little time left.
That's true...
Yotsuba, I'm sorry.\nI made you worry unnecessarily.
It's okay, it's okay.\nLittle sisters\nare supposed to trouble their big sisters.
If anything, I should be the one apologizing.\nI caused you so much trouble, Itsuki...\nI'm sorry. Even though I'm your big sister.
It's totally fine.\nUs little sisters too,\nwe want to support our big sisters.
Hehe. It's a give-and-take relationship, right?
That's...how we do things as sisters, after all.
